MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF EMA BELL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and Consent Judgment is granted.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
